ops.title: Fix stale appexes token in templates/release.yml.tmpl
ops.description: Found during cc-pool's Track P release-collapse (2026-07-19): release-app.yml's validator requires appexes entries to end in .appex and resolve as directories under the built app, and errors on any built appex left unlisted. daemonkit's templates/release.yml.tmpl ships 'appexes: __APP_NAME__Widget' (bare target name) — a caller generated from it fails the validator. cc-pool's working caller uses Contents/PlugIns/CCPoolStatusWidget.appex + Contents/PlugIns/CCPoolFileProvider.appex.

ops.text: the reference caller's appexes value is a Contents/PlugIns/<Name>.appex relative path (validator requires the .appex suffix + test -d), not a bare target name; template README note updated
